name: Elemental Evil Player's Companion
summary: Tracing their ancestry to the genies of the Elemental Planes, each genasi can tap into the power of one of the elements. Air, earth, fire, and water — these are the four pillars of the Material Plane and the four types of genasi. Some genasi are direct descendants of a genie, while others were born to non-genasi parents who lived near a place suffused by a genie’s magic.
bonuses: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
A typical genasi has a life span of 120 years
Tracing their ancestry to dao, the genies of the Elemental Plane of Earth, earth genasi inherit dao’s steadfast strength and control over earth.

Ability Score Increase.When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.
Size.You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

traits.name: Earth Walk
traits.summary: You can move across difficult terrain without expending extra movement if you are using your walking speed on the ground or a floor.

traits.name: Merge with Stone
traits.summary: You know theBlade Wardcantrip. You can cast it as normal, and you can also cast it as a bonus action a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining all expended uses when you finish a long rest. Starting at 5th level, you can cast thePass Without Tracespell with this trait, without requiring a material component. Once you cast that spell with this trait, you can’t do so again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast it using any spell slots you have of 2nd level or higher.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Genasi mature at about the same rate as humans and reach adulthood in their late teens. They live somewhat longer than humans do, up to 120 years.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Independent and self-reliant, genasi tend toward a neutral alignment.

traits.name: Earth Walk
traits.summary: You can move across difficult terrain made of earth or stone without expending extra movement.

traits.name: Merge with Stone
traits.summary: You can cast thePass without Tracespell once with this trait, requiring no material components, and you regain the ability to cast it this way when you finish a long rest. Constitution is your spellcasting ability for this spell.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.
